user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD (score, stage, apples, remaining knives) disappears because `renderUI(p)` is only called during the "PLAYING" phase
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add `renderUI(p)` call to the "PAUSED" case in the draw function so the HUD remains visible when paused
